operator.name: DocaRoceReceiverOp
operator.description: GPU-resident Holoscan SDK Operator for receiving video frames over RoCE using DOCA GPUNetIO for GPU-side CQ polling, eliminating CPU from the critical path.

requirements.holoscan_sensor_bridge: Requires Holoscan Sensor Bridge library to be installed
requirements.doca_sdk: Requires DOCA SDK 3.2.1+ with GPUNetIO support
